```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "netprof/parsers/flow_tracker.py",
  "3:VARINT": 3,
  "4:LEN": {
    "1:VARINT": 3,
    "2:LEN": "netprof/parsers/flow_tracker.py",
    "3:LEN": {
      "1:VARINT": 1899,
      "2:VARINT": 3242,
      "3:VARINT": 1343,
      "4:LEN": "        TH_SYN = 0x02\r\n        TH_FIN = 0x01\r\n        TH_RST = 0x04\r\n\r\n        self.last_ts = ts\r\n        self.end_ts = ts\r\n        if not self.start_ts:\r\n            self.start_ts = ts\r\n\r\n        # Determine direction: if we already know client, use it; else we'll set it below\r\n        if self.initiator_seen:\r\n            c2s = self.is_client_to_server(src_ip, src_port)\r\n        else:\r\n            # First packet: SYN sender is client. Key is (ep1, ep2) with ep1 <= ep2\r\n            if (src_ip, src_port) == self.key[0]:\r\n                c2s = True  # treat first endpoint as client until we see SYN from the other\r\n            else:\r\n                c2s = False\r\n\r\n        if c2s:\r\n            self.bytes_c2s += len(payload)\r\n            self.packets_c2s += 1\r\n            direction = \"c2s\"\r\n            if flags & TH_SYN and not self.syn_seen:\r\n                self.syn_seen = True\r\n                self.initiator_seen = True\r\n                self.client_ip = src_ip\r\n                self.client_port = src_port\r\n                self.client_syn_ts = ts\r\n        else:\r\n            self.bytes_s2c += len(payload)\r\n            self.packets_s2c += 1\r\n            direction = \"s2c\"\r\n            if not self.initiator_seen:\r\n                self.client_ip = dst_ip_from_key(self.key, src_ip, src_port)\r\n                self.client_port = dst_port_from_key(self.key, src_ip, src_port)\r\n                self.server_ip = src_ip\r\n                self.server_port = src_port\r\n                self.initiator_seen = True\r\n            if flags & TH_SYN and self.syn_seen and self.syn_ack_ts is None:\r\n                self.syn_ack_ts = ts\r\n"
    },
    "4:VARINT": 10305
  }
}
```

Key is (ep1, ep2) with ep1 <= ep2\r\n            if (src_ip, src_port) == self.key[0]:\r\n                c2s = True  # treat first endpoint as client until we see SYN from the other\r\n            else:\r\n                c2s = False\r\n\r\n        if c2s:\r\n            self.bytes_c2s += len(payload)\r\n            self.packets_c2s += 1\r\n            direction = \"c2s\"\r\n            if flags & TH_SYN and not self.syn_seen:\r\n                self.syn_seen = True\r\n                self.initiator_seen = True\r\n                self.client_ip = src_ip\r\n                self.client_port = src_port\r\n                self.client_syn_ts = ts\r\n        else:\r\n            self.bytes_s2c += len(payload)\r\n            self.packets_s2c += 1\r\n            direction = \"s2c\"\r\n            if not self.initiator_seen:\r\n                self.client_ip = dst_ip_from_key(self.key, src_ip, src_port)\r\n                self.client_port = dst_port_from_key(self.key, src_ip, src_port)\r\n                self.server_ip = src_ip\r\n                self.server_port = src_port\r\n                self.initiator_seen = True\r\n            if flags & TH_SYN and self.syn_seen and self.syn_ack_ts is None:\r\n                self.syn_ack_ts = ts\r\n"}, "4:VARINT": 10305}}
